sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Geothermal vent discovered nearby. The colony feels hopeful. My faith grows stronger.
The geothermal_vent changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
Year 68 on Mars. Geothermal vent discovered nearby. Morale is hopeful. We have 180 food units left.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 68): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
